message:
Update golden test fixtures with schema_version, dcg_version, and robot_mode fields

Add three new metadata fields to all robot-mode golden test JSON fixtures:
- schema_version: 1 (versioned output format for forward compatibility)
- dcg_version: "0.4.1" (tracks which DCG release generated the output)
- robot_mode: true (explicitly marks fixtures as robot/machine-readable output)

These fields were added to the robot-mode JSON output format and the golden
test fixtures need to reflect the updated schema to keep tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,7 @@
 {
+  "schema_version": 1,
+  "dcg_version": "0.4.1",
+  "robot_mode": true,
   "command": "rm -rf /",
   "decision": "deny",
   "rule_id": "core.filesystem:rm-rf-root-home",
@@ -16,4 +19,4 @@
     "trust_level": "medium",
     "detection_method": "none"
   }
-}
+}
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -1,4 +1,7 @@
 {
+  "schema_version": 1,
+  "dcg_version": "0.4.1",
+  "robot_mode": true,
   "command": "git push --force origin main",
   "decision": "deny",
   "rule_id": "core.git:push-force-long",
@@ -17,4 +20,4 @@
     "trust_level": "medium",
     "detection_method": "none"
   }
-}
+}
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -1,4 +1,7 @@
 {
+  "schema_version": 1,
+  "dcg_version": "0.4.1",
+  "robot_mode": true,
   "command": "git reset --hard",
   "decision": "deny",
   "rule_id": "core.git:reset-hard",
@@ -17,4 +20,4 @@
     "trust_level": "medium",

   }
-}
+}
